entries.current_write: Writes .notes/rooms metadata, creates .notes/rooms log, and upserts SQLite room before ROOM_CREATED append_event.
entries.target_boundary: authority command -> ROOM_CREATED event -> .notes compatibility projection and Forward SQLite index
entries.fallback: Revert only room create ordering while keeping RED tests and inventory; narrow to metadata-only projection repair.

entries.current_write: Updates room metadata, appends .notes/rooms JSONL, and inserts SQLite message before ROOM_MESSAGE append_event; event payload is insufficient for replay.
entries.target_boundary: authority command -> replay-sufficient ROOM_MESSAGE event -> metadata/log/SQLite projections
entries.fallback: Revert only message ordering while preserving payload sufficiency test; split message id generation from projection append.

entries.current_write: Appends transcript record and writes active meeting files before MEETING_STARTED append_event.
entries.target_boundary: meeting command -> MEETING_STARTED event plus transcript evidence ref/hash -> active meeting projection
entries.fallback: Keep transcript evidence append but mark active meeting files as projection; repair after room slice is green.

entries.current_write: Appends redacted transcript record before MEETING_MSG append_event with masked text payload.
entries.target_boundary: transcript evidence append with stable id/hash plus policy-approved metadata event or content_ref
entries.fallback: Preserve masked transcript behavior and add metadata-only event link before changing payload shape.

metadata.privacy_rule: unredacted transcript content must not enter event or browser payload

entries.current_write: Writes spawn record and launches external process before SUBAGENT_SPAWNED append_event.
entries.target_boundary: SUBAGENT_SPAWN_REQUESTED event -> external launch -> SUBAGENT_SPAWNED or SUBAGENT_SPAWN_FAILED observed event -> record projection
entries.fallback: Leave current spawn path unchanged until requested/observed lifecycle events are added behind compatibility reads.

entries.current_write: Creates handoff packets and mirrors them into files/SQLite for agent transfer paths.
entries.target_boundary: handoff command/event -> compact packet projection and SQLite operational index
entries.fallback: Keep file and SQLite mirrors while introducing event-derived read path behind existing facade.

entries.current_write: Service facade delegates room create/message writes to ensemble_room legacy functions.
entries.target_boundary: service facade remains stable while ensemble_room changes to event-first internals
entries.fallback: Keep service signatures unchanged; revert internals without changing callers if behavior regresses.

entries.current_write: Inserted the SQLite tool-event projection before ROOM_TOOL_EVENT or TOOL_EVENT append_event.
entries.target_boundary: tool command -> replay-sufficient interaction.command_executed event -> redacted SQLite projection
entries.fallback: Keep the service signature stable and revert only projection enrichment if consumers reject the returned event_id.

entries.current_write: Authenticated POST routes create operator tasks/workspaces, decide approvals, resume runs, and request task approval through repository/runtime services.
entries.target_boundary: operator command service with actor, rationale, idempotency, approval, event/projection policy, and path/privacy validation
entries.fallback: Keep route compatibility and move one command at a time behind a command facade with current payload shape.

entries.current_write: Authenticated PATCH routes update operator tasks/workspaces directly through LoopStateRepository.
entries.target_boundary: operator command service with event or explicit forward-only operational classification pending repair
entries.fallback: Preserve HTTP route and payload while extracting storage call into a command helper covered by spy tests.

entries.current_write: Authenticated DELETE routes delete operator tasks and include patch approval shortcuts that call agent_apply_patch.
entries.target_boundary: operator command service; patch approval must pass approval state and event/audit boundary before applying
entries.fallback: Disable only shortcut route behind compatibility error if it cannot be made approval-bound; keep normal approval decision route.

entries.current_write: Owns SQLite writes for runs, iterations, rooms, messages, handoffs, approvals, operator tasks, and workspaces.
entries.target_boundary: repository remains bounded storage/index behind command services and projectors until promotion gates pass
entries.fallback: Do not change repository schema in first slice; adapt callers to event-first ordering around existing methods.

entries.target_boundary: deterministic projector from event ledger to .notes views
entries.fallback: Projector remains rebuild-only; if deterministic test fails, repair projector before moving more writers.
